hero.sub: More than a gym. A sanctuary for those who refuse ordinary. Train with elite coaches, recover in private suites, and become the strongest version of yourself.

features.head: An experience engineered for results.
features.sub: Four pillars that define the HERO standard. Every detail is calibrated for performance, recovery, and sustained transformation.

card1.title: Certified Trainers
card1.desc: Every coach holds a minimum NASM-CPT certification with 5+ years of elite-level experience. Hand-picked, continuously evaluated.

card2.title: Premium Equipment
card2.desc: Curated selection of Technogym, Eleiko, and Hammer Strength. Calibrated weekly. Replaced before wear ever shows.

card3.title: Personalized Programs
card3.desc: No template programs. Your training is built around your body, your goals, your schedule — and adjusted every 4 weeks.

card4.title: Modern Facilities
card4.desc: Recovery suites, infrared sauna, cryotherapy, and private training studios. 24/7 access for members.

gallery.sub: Real members. Real timelines. Real results. Drag the divider on any card to witness each transformation unfold in real time.

membership.title: Choose your
membership.sub: Flexible structures. No hidden fees. Cancel anytime. Every membership includes an initial consultation and a customized 12-week blueprint.
membership.noPlans: No active subscription plans available at this time.
membership.descPlaceholder: Access to premium gym equipment, customizable training sessions, and elite wellness recovery suites.

contact.title: Your transformation
contact.sub: Book your visit and pick up your luxury club keycard. Experience premium fitness designed specifically for your goals.
contact.formSub: Fill out the credentials below. Our guest concierge will reach out within 24 hours.

cta.title: Stop waiting. Start forging.
cta.sub: Your first session is complimentary. No contracts. No pressure. Just you, our coaches, and the first step toward the body you've earned.

footer.brandDesc: Architecting transformations since 2014. A sanctuary for those who refuse ordinary — built for the relentless.
footer.rights: © {year} HERO GYM. All rights reserved. Crafted for the relentless.
